summary: Soundboard recording with some sound problems captures a mind‑blowing 1982 show highlighted by an energetic double encore.
review: The tape is a soundboard source that suffers from occasional sound issues, but it still delivers the excitement of a rare early‑August 1982 performance. Fans recall the crowd erupting into dance and a memorable double encore that makes this gig stand out among dozens they later saw. Despite the technical flaws, the overall experience is praised as a little gem worth checking out.

ai_rating.rationale: One enthusiastic 4‑star review highlights an exceptional live performance with only moderate recording problems, leading to a solid overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes sound problems (muddiness/dropouts) but appreciates having a soundboard source compared to older audience tapes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Performance built strong momentum, culminating in an energetic double encore that got the crowd dancing; overall flow described as mind‑blowing and memorable.
